prompt_task: atac.doublet.q1.bed.gz contains a fragment file from a scATAC-seq sample (hg38). Barcodes with low read counts have been filtered out. Look for doublets. Return the coordinates of any one doublet, if any. Respond only with the label of the barcode in the format: "AAATGGAACGTTAAAG-1", or "None". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
